# 03-restore-and-build: Restore Dependencies and Build Solution

Restore NuGet packages for the new target framework and build the entire solution to verify compatibility.

Assessment confirms all 2 NuGet packages (BenchmarkDotNet, Microsoft.VisualStudio.DiagnosticsHub.BenchmarkDotNetDiagnosers) are compatible with .NET 9.0.

**Done when**: Solution builds successfully with 0 errors, all packages restored for net9.0
